author: lionirdeadman's code + edits
name: anisearch
short: Search for anime, manga, characters and users using Anilist + direct MyAnimeList (Jikan v4) support.
description:
Modern 2026 Redbot updates:
• Hybrid commands (prefix + slash support)
• Persistent aiohttp session (better performance)
• Added genres + studios to Anilist embeds
• Direct MAL search via Jikan (full compatibility with both sites)
• Fixed spoiler regex, better error handling, cleaner code
• Backward-compatible reaction menu (still works perfectly in 2026)
install_msg:
AniSearch installed!

This cog uses the free Anilist GraphQL API and Jikan (MyAnimeList) API. No API keys are required.
end_user_data_statement: This cog fetches data from Anilist and MyAnimeList (Jikan API) and displays it in Discord embeds. No user data is stored or processed beyond search queries.
